title: cytisus striatus subsp. megalanthus
intro: Cytisus striatus subsp. megalanthus, also known as the yellow broom or mountain broom, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure, due to its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Cytisus striatus subsp. megalanthus include its potential to help with digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
